title: Gensokyo Izakaya
description: An addon mod for Farmer's Delight
body:
## What project is this?
This is a plugin for Farmers Delight.We have added some dishes to this mod</br>
The initial plan,We want to restore some of the mechanics of the Indie game"Touhou Mystia's Izakaya"
</br>
**PLEASE DON'T USE THIS MOD,THIS IS A ELERY DEV PREVIEW PROJECT!**</br>
But before this project is perfected, we will first serve as a Farmers Delight plugin</br>
Our advantages are:
- Carefully crafted art resources
- Most dishes can be placed
- Provides immersive item tooltip explanations for self, vanilla, and Farmers Delight
## What has been updated recently
- Updated a series of egg themed foods
- Updated a series of furniture(No function available at the moment)
![Modeling effect of placement food ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9a72538ae5e375a4a55f47a4d45f4704468b27e.jpeg)
## What will be updated in the future?
- More dishes available
- Better modeling
- More interesting designs
- Complete simulated business gameplay
## Something that must be explained
- The project is still under development, with incomplete functionality and may not be stable.Please try to avoid using alpha versions in important situations as much as possible
- This project use MIT license,You are free to use it while complying with the MIT license
</br></br>
If you have any questions, feature requests, or problem reports, please go to GitHub issues to ask.also you can send email to 2272353474@qq.com</br>
